title: Hugo Salabio
extract:
Hugo Salabio (born 27 July 2000) is a French professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop forward for Halifax Panthers in the RFL Championship on short-term loan from Hull FC in the Super League and France at international level.
He has previously played for the Catalans Dragons, Wakefield Trinity and the Huddersfield Giants in the Super League and for Toulouse Olympique in the Championship.
